ai_summary: This document reveals that BIL Vyapar Limited is currently "under CIRP" (Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process), signifying severe financial distress. It serves as a regulatory intimation for the 17th meeting of its Committee of Creditors, scheduled for July 17, 2026. The primary red flag is the company's ongoing insolvency, which will materially impact its operations and equity value as creditors determine the resolution plan.
